zh.lifeSummary: 當Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg於1300年出生在德國尼德薩辛歐登伯格時，他的父親Graf Johann II von Oldenburg28歲，母親Hedwig von Diepholz36歲。他和Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1347年在德國尼德薩辛享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Conrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English spelling of Konrad, a Germanic personal name derived from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’. It was used occasionally in Britain in the Middle Ages in honour of a 10th-century bishop of Constance, but modern use in the English-speaking world is a reimportation from Germany dating mainly from the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

en.lifeSummary: When Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg was born in 1300, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Graf Johann II von Oldenburg, was 28 and his mother, Hedwig von Diepholz, was 36. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön. He died in 1347, in Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg est né en 1300, à Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Johann II von Oldenburg, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Diepholz, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön. Il est décédé en 1347, à Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg 1300 in Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Johann II von Oldenburg 28 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Diepholz 36. Er hatte mit Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1347 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg è nato il nel 1300 nel Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Johann II von Oldenburg, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Diepholz, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön. Morì nel 1347, nel Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburgが1300年にドイツニーダーサチセンオルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Johann II von Oldenburgは28歳，母Hedwig von Diepholzは36歳であった。彼はIngeborg of Holstein-Plönとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1347年にドイツニーダーサチセンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg(이)가 1300년 독일 니더작센 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Johann II von Oldenburg(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Diepholz(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 독일 니더작센에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg родился в 1300 г. в местности олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Johann II von Oldenburg было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Diepholz, 36. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön. Он умер в 1347 г. в местности ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg nació en 1300, en Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Johann II von Oldenburg, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Diepholz, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön. Murió en 1347, en Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años.
